1.1: Maret Coll — hall-keeper; Sable was told that nothing happens in this hall without the hall-keeper's knowledge, and she finds that both useful and inconvenient.

2.1: The gather-stone — she came to Thousand-valleys specifically because word of the new marks reached her; she has already seen them once and is working from memory until she can return.
2.2: Old Pell's counting-house — she knows it holds sixty years of drove-road records and believes the marks on the gather-stone will have precedents somewhere in those ledgers.

content._: What sable has come to know.
